calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Plaintiff Clint Maples is present.
Attorney, John R. Weinstein appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendants, Jeffrey Silvia and Melissa Cole are present.
Attorney, Charles J.S. Woodson representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 2 Townsend Street, #4-209, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of AUG-24-2009 is vacated.
